ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charging_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the charging station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the charging station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the charging station's location */,
  "town" TEXT /* Town where the charging station is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the charging station is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the charging station's location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, out of service) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name of the operator or company managing the station */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station the point belongs to */,
  "connector_type" TEXT /* Type of connector used (e.g., Type 2 Mennekes (IEC62196)) */,
  "rated_output_kw" REAL /* Rated output of the charging point in kW */,
  "output_current" REAL /* Output current of the charging point in A */,
  "rated_voltage" REAL /* Rated voltage of the charging point in V */,
  "charge_method" TEXT /* Method of charging (e.g., Three Phase AC) */,
  "charge_mode" TEXT /* Mode of charging (e.g., 3) */,
  "tethered_cable" INTEGER /* Whether the charging point has a tethered cable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the charging point (e.g., available, in use, out of service) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "number_of_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of charging sessions the point has handled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_points_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user has an active subscription */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "subscription_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's subscription plan */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_subscription_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_plan_id") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging session */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging point used in the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the charging session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the charging session */,
  "total_energy_delivered" REAL /* Total energy delivered during the session in kWh */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the charging session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the charging session (e.g., ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle being charged */,
  "plate_number" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating for the charging experience */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES charging_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging session the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES charging_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Monthly price of the subscription plan */,
  "max_sessions" INTEGER /* Maximum number of charging sessions allowed per month */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Additional benefits included in the plan (e.g., priority access, discounted rates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)
